issues.description: Lesson folder name references wrong module (14 instead of 15)
issues.details: Folder '01-module-14-lesson-1-implicit-animations' should be '01-implicit-animations' for consistency. The lesson.json correctly has id 'lesson-15-01'.

issues.description: Starter file contains TODO comments that should be minimal guidance
issues.details: File: starter.dart - Contains '// TODO: Implement the expandable card' with detailed instructions. Should be simplified to just a skeleton with comments.
Challenge ID '14.2-challenge-0' uses wrong module prefix (14 instead of 15).
module.json title field: 'Module 14: Advanced UI' - should be 'Module 15: Advanced UI' to match the folder structure and order.

issues.description: intl package version not specified in content
issues.details: Lesson discusses ARB files and localization but doesn't reference specific intl package version. Could add: 'intl: ^0.19.0' to be consistent with Drift/dependencies approach in other modules.
